familytree.screen.browser.title: Family Tree - Tracked Pets
familytree.screen.view.title: Family Tree of %s
familytree.screen.empty: No tracked pets yet. Tame and breed a cat, wolf, parrot, or horse to start.
familytree.not_available: Family Tree is not installed on this server.
familytree.screen.settings.title: Family Tree Settings
familytree.command.scan.result: Family Tree scan complete: imported %s pets, refreshed %s existing records.
familytree.command.locate.deceased: %s died on day %s. Last known location:
familytree.command.locate.no_position: No known location for %s yet. Try /familytree scan while the pet is loaded.
familytree.command.pair.same_parent: Parent A and Parent B must be different pets.
familytree.command.pair.child_matches_pa: The child must be different from both parents.
familytree.command.pair.species_mismatch: Parents and child must all be the same species.
familytree.command.setage.invalid: Cannot set age to %s days when the latest valid world day is %s.
familytree.command.setage.result: Set %s to %s days old. Birth day is now %s.
familytree.command.setbirth.invalid: Cannot set birth day to %s when the latest valid world day is %s.
familytree.command.setbirth.result: Set %s to be born on day %s. Relative age is now %s days.
familytree.command.info.help.title: Family Tree tracks your tamed pets, breeding lines, names, ownership, and deaths.
familytree.command.info.help.summary: Use the Family Tree screen to browse pets and lineage, or use commands to manage data directly.
familytree.command.info.help.commands: Commands: /familytree list, /familytree scan, /familytree pair, /familytree unpair, /familytree setage, /familytree setbirth, /familytree prune, /familytree info <name>.
familytree.command.info.help.scan: /familytree scan imports already-tamed pets that are loaded in the world.
familytree.command.info.help.pair: /familytree pair links two parents to a child record.
familytree.command.info.help.unpair: /familytree unpair clears the parent links from a child record.
familytree.command.info.help.setage: /familytree setage changes a pet to a relative age in world days, for example 15 days old.
familytree.command.info.help.setbirth: /familytree setbirth sets the pet's birth day directly, for example born on day 20.
familytree.tool.not_tamed: That animal is not tamed, so it cannot be linked.
